zh.lifeSummary: Obispo Nuño de Astorga是Alfonso Alvarez Amaya和Goncio O Gontroda Gutierrez的兒子，於1210年出生在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安利安阿斯托爾加。他和Wife of Nuno Obispo de Astorga至少有1個女兒。他去世於1241年在西班牙享年31歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Astorga
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Luis, Juan, Francisco, Mario, Arturo, Jesus, Ruben, Adolfo, Ana, Benito, Cruz.
Spanish: habitational name from the ancient city of Astorga in León, named in Latin Asturica. Compare Ostorga .

variants.name: Estorga
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish   Astorga  .

variants.name: Ostorga
meanings: Hispanic (mainly El Salvador): altered form of Spanish   Astorga  .

nameMeanings.name: Nuño
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of the Irish name Úna , assimilated to the name of the Roman goddess Juno, consort of Jupiter.

en.lifeSummary: Obispo Nuño de Astorga was born in 1210, in Astorga, León, Castilla y León, Spain as the son of Alfonso Alvarez Amaya and Goncio O Gontroda Gutierrez. He had at least 1 daughter with Wife of Nuno Obispo de Astorga. He died in 1241, in Spain, at the age of 31.

ja.lifeSummary: Obispo Nuño de Astorgaは1210年にスペインカスティラ イ レoンレoンアストルガでAlfonso Alvarez AmayaとGoncio O Gontroda Gutierrezの息子として生まれた。彼はWife of Nuno Obispo de Astorgaとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1241年にスペインで31歳で死去した。

ko.Astorga, León, Castilla y León, España: 스페인 카스틸라 이 레o 레o 애스토르가
ko.lifeSummary: Obispo Nuño de Astorga(은)는 1210년 스페인 카스틸라 이 레o 레o 애스토르가에서 Alfonso Alvarez Amaya(와)과 Goncio O Gontroda Gutierrez의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Wife of Nuno Obispo de Astorga(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1241년 스페인에서 31세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Obispo Nuño de Astorga nasceu em 1210, em Astorga, León, Castilla y León, Espanha filho de Alfonso Alvarez Amaya e Goncio O Gontroda Gutierrez. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Wife of Nuno Obispo de Astorga. Ele faleceu em 1241, em Espanha, com 31 anos.

ru.Astorga, León, Castilla y León, España: асторга, леoн, кастилла и леoн, Испания
ru.lifeSummary: Obispo Nuño de Astorga родился в 1210 г. в местности асторга, леoн, кастилла и леoн, Испания. Его родителей звали Alfonso Alvarez Amaya и Goncio O Gontroda Gutierrez. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Wife of Nuno Obispo de Astorga. Он умер в 1241 г. в местности Испания в возрасте 31 год.
